name: commentx
description: Real-time AI commentary for any video

scripts.build: powershell -Command "if (!(Test-Path public/wasm)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force public/wasm } ; Copy-Item 'node_modules/onnxruntime-web/dist/ort-wasm-*' 'public/wasm/' -Force" && vite build && copy manifest.json dist\
